headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on American Electric Power, Lowers Price Target to $145
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   maintains American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $148 to $145.
